title: Wire orphaned MiniBatchNMF and SparsePCA into ferrolearn-decomp lib.rs
description:
minibatch_nmf.rs (MiniBatchNMF + MiniBatchNMFInit + FittedMiniBatchNMF) and sparse_pca.rs (SparsePCA + FittedSparsePCA) exist in src/ but are never declared via pub mod / pub use in lib.rs. Same orphan-bug pattern as the tree (#267) and linear (#284) audits.

Fix: add declarations and re-exports. Already have Transform impls so the rest of the crate machinery just works once exposed.
